positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical woodland scene. The main subject is a group of friendly forest animals (rabbits, foxes, and owls) interacting playfully around a giant, glowing mushroom. The composition is circular and balanced, ideal for a central print. Use thick, clean line art and flat, jewel-toned colors (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and sunflower yellow) with strong color blocking. The style should be reminiscent of vintage storybook illustrations combined with modern kawaii aesthetics. High contrast black outlines are essential for print transfer. Clean background with minimal depth, ensuring all elements pop against the white canvas. Vector art quality, no gradients.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, grayscale, monochrome, blur, fuzzy, noise, artifact, text, watermark, signature, multiple subjects, extra limbs, poorly drawn anatomy, messy background, low contrast, gradient, logo, symbol
